---
name: Add New Topic
about: Propose a new technology/tool to be added to LearningBot
title: '[NEW TOPIC] '
labels: 'enhancement, content'
assignees: ''
---

## Topic Information

**Technology/Tool Name:** 
<!-- e.g., Apache Flink -->

**Category/Pillar:**
<!-- Select one: -->
- [ ] Foundations / Core Skills
- [ ] Data Engineering & Streaming
- [ ] AI / ML / GenAI
- [ ] Cloud Platforms
- [ ] DevOps / Platform
- [ ] Application Layers (Frontend / Backend)
- [ ] Programs & POCs

**Priority:**
<!-- Select one: -->
- [ ] HIGH (Critical for AI/Data Architect role)
- [ ] MEDIUM (Important but not critical)
- [ ] LOW (Nice to have)

## Justification

**Why should this topic be included?**
<!-- Explain the relevance to AI/Data Architect role, market demand, etc. -->

**Target Audience:**
<!-- e.g., Senior Data Engineers transitioning to Architect, ML Engineers, etc. -->

**Related Topics:**
<!-- List related existing topics in LearningBot -->

## Content Plan

**Proposed Location:**
<!-- e.g., `14-TechStack/DataEngineering/ApacheFlink` -->

**Content Assets:**
<!-- Check what you plan to create: -->
- [ ] `what.md` - Conceptual overview
- [ ] `guide.md` - End-to-end walkthrough
- [ ] `Interview.md` - Architect/interview cheatsheet
- [ ] `Visual.md` - Mermaid diagrams
- [ ] `interactive-*.html` - Interactive demo

**Estimated Effort:**
<!-- e.g., 1-2 days, 1 week, etc. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other information, links, or context that would be helpful -->

## Checklist

Before submitting:
- [ ] I've checked that this topic doesn't already exist
- [ ] I've reviewed the [Contribution Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I've reviewed the [Markdown Templates](../todo/plan/markdown-templates.md)
- [ ] I understand the required asset structure
